hero.subtitle: Since its establishment in 2018, VILA SANMYSHI has continuously strived to develop and improve its orientation in the field of commerce and import-export services. With a customer-centric orientation, the company step by step builds prestige through service quality, transparency and spirit of responsibility. We aim to become a reliable partner, accompanying businesses in all logistics and import-export activities, bringing sustainable and long-term value.

history.label: Establishment
history.desc: VILA SANMYSHI TMDV XNK CO., LTD officially came into operation in Quang Tri.

history.label: Market Expansion
history.desc: Developed a network of domestic and international partners, focusing on general wholesale.
Continuing to confirm its position as a prestigious and professional import-export unit in the Central region.

timeline.desc: The company was officially established in Quang Tri, laying the foundation for activities in the field of trade and import-export.
Step by step improving operation processes, training personnel and building a sustainable development foundation.
Strengthening cooperation with domestic and foreign partners, expanding the scope of activities in the field of import-export.
Applying technology to management and document processing, improving work efficiency and minimizing errors in the process.
Recorded clear growth in the number of customers and projects, while improving transport and service processing capacity.
Expanding related services such as warehousing, multimodal transport and import-export entrustment for businesses.
Focusing on standardizing processes, improving service quality and comprehensively improving customer experience.
Continuing to affirm position as a prestigious unit in the field of import-export, aiming for long-term and sustainable development.
